query: Could you design a one-week travel itinerary for two, departing from Houston and touring three cities in Tennessee from March 21st to March 27th, 2022? Our budget is now $8,200. We require accommodations that allow smoking and should ideally be private rooms. As for transportation, we would prefer not to self-drive.

plan.attraction: Country Music Hall of Fame and Museum; Johnny Cash Museum; Centennial Park;
plan.accommodation: Clean and large bedroom in a private house, Nashville

plan.attraction: Belle Meade Historic Site & Winery; The Parthenon; Musicians Hall of Fame and Museum;
plan.accommodation: Clean and large bedroom in a private house, Nashville

plan.attraction: NashTrash Tours; Lane Motor Museum; Honky Tonk Highway;
plan.accommodation: Clean and large bedroom in a private house, Nashville

plan.attraction: World's Fair Park; Knoxville Museum of Art; Sunsphere;
plan.accommodation: Cozy Private Room in Chinatown/ Lower East Side, Knoxville

plan.attraction: Ijams Nature Center; Muse Knoxville; Knoxville Botanical Garden and Arboretum;
plan.accommodation: Cozy Private Room in Chinatown/ Lower East Side, Knoxville

plan.attraction: Haunted Knoxville Ghost Tours; Three Rivers Rambler; Charles Krutch Park;
plan.accommodation: Cozy Private Room in Chinatown/ Lower East Side, Knoxville

plan.attraction: The Chattanooga Zoo at Warner Park; Tennessee Aquarium; Lookout Mountain Incline Railway;
